name: notifications-in-app
description: In-app notification channel. Registers `in_app` with the core `NotificationChannelRegistry` + subscribes to `NotificationDispatched` events. On dispatch: writes a NotificationDelivery row (channel=in_app, state=delivered) synchronously (in-app delivery is guaranteed on DB write) + emits a Reverb broadcast on `user.{id}.notifications` for live inbox updates. Owns zero entities — the Notification + NotificationDelivery rows are core's; this module writes to them via the core's DispatchGateway contract. Zero external subprocessors when using self-hosted Reverb; Pusher/Ably are pluggable alternatives via the BroadcastManager.

channelRegistration.registration: The service provider calls `NotificationChannelRegistry::register('in_app', InAppChannel::class)` in boot(). Core's DispatchGateway dispatches NotificationDispatched events; this module's listener translates them into DB writes + Reverb broadcasts.
